name: Radium Life Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Radium Life Technology Co., Ltd. develops real estate projects in Taiwan. It develops and operates T9 BOT project, which consists of a bus terminal, four residential buildings, two office towers, a shopping center, a hotel, and a movie theatre; MEHAS project covering an area of 22,000 square meters; BOND 18 project; and E.A.T project. The company also engages in retail, luxury hotel, bus terminal management, property management, biotech and skin care, sewage treatment, renewable energy, property leasing, and elderly care businesses. Radium Life Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
